e.miAtkCD--;const miCD=e.phase===1?55:90; if(e.miAtkCD<=0&&lpm){const mp=e.miAtkIdx%3;e.miAtkIdx++; if(mp===0){// GOLD SHOWER — rains down gold projectiles for(let i=-3;i<=3;i++)bullets.push({x:lpm.x+i*30,y:-10,vx:i*0.5,vy:4+e.phase,isE:true,dmg:2,life:100,explosive:false,plasma:false,r:6,cannon:false}); }else if(mp===1){// GOLDEN TOUCH — fast wave of bullets toward player const dx=lpm.x-e.x,dy=(lpm.y-lpm.h/2)-(e.y-e.h*.5),d=Math.max(1,Math.hypot(dx,dy)); for(let i=-2;i<=2;i++)bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y-e.h*.5,vx:dx/d*(8+e.phase*2)+i,vy:dy/d*(8+e.phase*2),isE:true,dmg:2,life:110,explosive:false,plasma:true,r:5,cannon:false}); }else{// GOLD SLAM — jumps on player, wide explosion e.vy=-12;e.x=lpm.x+(Math.random()>.5?40:-40); setTimeout(()=>{if(!e.dead)for(let i=0;i<12;i++){const a=i*Math.PI/6;bullets.push({x:e.x,y:GY,vx:Math.cos(a)*(6+e.phase*2),vy:Math.sin(a)*(6+e.phase*2)-2,isE:true,dmg:2,life:80,explosive:true,plasma:false,r:8,cannon:false});}},400); } e.miAtkCD=miCD; } lp.forEach(p=>{if(!p.inv&&Math.abs(p.x-e.x)0?lp.reduce((a,b)=>Math.hypot(b.x-e.x,b.y-e.y)=GY){e.y=GY;e.vy=0;}e.x=Math.max(30,Math.min(BW-30,e.x)); // Occasional hop if(e.arTick%70===0&&e.y>=GY)e.vy=-10; e.arAtkCD--;const arCD=e.phase===1?45:75; if(e.arAtkCD<=0&&lpa){const ap=e.arAtkIdx%3;e.arAtkIdx++; if(ap===0){// CONFETTI BURST — colorful spiral attack const n=16+e.phase*8;const colors=['#ff4444','#44ff44','#4444ff','#ffff44','#ff44ff']; for(let i=0;i{if(!e.dead&&lpa&&!lpa.dead)bullets.push({x:lpa.x+(Math.random()-.5)*80,y:-5,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*2,vy:5+Math.random()*3,isE:true,dmg:2,life:90,explosive:true,plasma:false,r:8,cannon:false});},i*120); }else{// DASH — quick triple-jab toward player const dx=lpa.x-e.x,dy=(lpa.y-lpa.h/2)-(e.y-e.h*.5),d=Math.max(1,Math.hypot(dx,dy)); for(let i=0;i<3;i++)setTimeout(()=>{if(!e.dead&&lpa&&!lpa.dead)bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y-e.h*.4,vx:dx/d*10,vy:dy/d*10,isE:true,dmg:1,life:80,explosive:false,plasma:false,r:4,cannon:false});},i*80); } e.arAtkCD=arCD; } lp.forEach(p=>{if(!p.inv&&Math.abs(p.x-e.x)0?lp.reduce((a,b)=>Math.hypot(b.x-e.x,b.y-e.y)e.x?1:-1; e.flAtkCD--;const flCD=e.phase===1?40:70; if(e.flAtkCD<=0&&lpf){const fp=e.flAtkIdx%3;e.flAtkIdx++; if(fp===0){// DIVE STRAFING — fast horizontal sweep const sweepY=lpf.y-lpf.h/2; for(let i=0;i<6;i++)setTimeout(()=>{if(!e.dead)bullets.push({x:e.dir===1?-10:BW+10,y:sweepY+(Math.random()-.5)*20,vx:e.dir*(12+e.phase*3),vy:(Math.random()-.5),isE:true,dmg:1,life:60,explosive:false,plasma:true,r:4,cannon:false});},i*50); }else if(fp===1){// BOMB DROP — falls toward player then shoots radially e.flAlt++;e.vy=10;setTimeout(()=>{if(!e.dead){e.vy=-12;for(let i=0;i<12;i++){const a=i*(Math.PI/6);bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:Math.cos(a)*(7+e.phase*2),vy:Math.sin(a)*(7+e.phase*2),isE:true,dmg:1,life:90,explosive:true,plasma:false,r:7,cannon:false});}}},500); }else{// MISSILE SPIRAL — spiraling missiles from above const dx=lpf.x-e.x,dy=lpf.y-e.y,d=Math.max(1,Math.hypot(dx,dy)); for(let i=0;i<8+e.phase*4;i++)setTimeout(()=>{if(!e.dead&&lpf&&!lpf.dead)bullets.push({x:e.x+(Math.random()-.5)*20,y:e.y,vx:dx/d*(7+Math.random()*3),vy:dy/d*(7+Math.random()*3),isE:true,dmg:1,life:100,explosive:true,plasma:false,r:6,cannon:false});},i*60); } e.flAtkCD=flCD; } lp.forEach(p=>{if(!p.inv&&Math.abs(p.x-e.x)<30&&Math.abs(p.y-e.y)<30){p.hp--;p.inv=50;spawnFX(p.x,p.y,'#ff6600',4);}}); hpBar(e.x-35,e.y-e.h-12,70,5,e.hp,e.maxHp,'#ff6600','#000000'); txt('FLYNN',e.x,e.y-e.h-18,4,'#ff6600','center',true); } if(e.type==='boss'&&e.bossVariant==='caine'){ e.phase=e.hp0?lp.reduce((a,b)=>Math.hypot(b.x-e.x,b.y-e.y).5?80:-80)));e.y=GY;spawnFX(e.x,e.y,'#aa00ff',20);} if(lpc){const cdx=lpc.x-e.x;if(Math.abs(cdx)>60)e.x+=Math.sign(cdx)*e.speed*(1+e.phase*.4);e.dir=Math.sign(cdx)||1;} e.vy+=.5;e.y+=e.vy;if(e.y>=GY){e.y=GY;e.vy=0;}e.x=Math.max(40,Math.min(BW-40,e.x)); e.caAtkCD--;const caCD=e.phase===2?35:e.phase===1?50:70; if(e.caAtkCD<=0&&lpc){const cp=e.caAtkIdx%4;e.caAtkIdx++; if(cp===0){// CHAOS RING — expanding multicolor ring const n=20+e.phase*8; for(let i=0;i{if(!e.dead&&lpc&&!lpc.dead)for(let i=-2;i<=2;i++)bullets.push({x:e.x,y:e.y-e.h*.5,vx:dx/d*(9+e.phase*2)+i*0.8,vy:dy/d*(9+e.phase*2),isE:true,dmg:2,life:110,explosive:false,plasma:true,r:5,cannon:false});},300);
